final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original hotel poolside scene illustration with a tropical resort aesthetic (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "热带度假风" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 1980s Club Med resort photography, Slim Aarons poolside glamour (mid-century leisure photography), contemporary Maldives resort visual branding; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include an infinity pool overlooking the ocean, lounge chairs and beach umbrellas, coconut palm trees, blue sky with white clouds
Scene/backdrop: must include open ocean horizon visible beyond the infinity pool edge, tropical resort setting
Lighting/mood: needs a sun-drenched, vacation-escapism atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a high-saturation, vivid tropical direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
